summary: Iteration 5 testing complete: Socios CRUD, photo upload, locations section, team assignment, Ingreso Real calculation, and financials panel all tested and working. Backend 13/13 tests passed. Frontend UI flows verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/socios (list) excludes photo/photo_content_type fields for performance - correct pattern since photo is stored as base64 in MongoDB
TeamSection: getSocio() called on assign to fetch full photo - good pattern to avoid stale photo data
seed_data_creation: Cleanup was done. Test data prefixed TEST_ was created and deleted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 features all verified working. Key items tested: (1) Socios CRUD + photo upload via POST /api/socios/{id}/photo - all pass; (2) Locations section edit/save with Waze URLs - confirmed working with toast 'Ubicaciones guardadas'; (3) Team assignment (assign partner with payment amount) - working; (4) Ingreso Real = total_amount - teamCost (NOT advance_paid) - correct in both backend and frontend; (5) GET /api/financials returns total_event_amount, total_partner_cost, real_income correctly; (6) Financial panel on Socios page shows all 3 metrics. No bugs found.
rca_of_issues: No bugs found in iteration 5 features.
